text: stira
Behavioral Intelligence · Mobile App
Document Purpose

This document is the complete feature plan for the Stira mobile app (Flutter). It is organized as a developer and product reference — every feature is described with its screen location, exact interactions, Flutter implementation notes, and build priority. This is a living document; version 1.0.
Market Research Base: Quittr · Fortify · Brainbuddy · BeatIt · Relay · Covenant Eyes · Ever Accountable · Rewire · NoFap Emergency · MDF · Quitzilla · Canopy
1.  App Navigation Map
Stira uses a 4-tab bottom navigation bar as the core navigation spine. All features are reachable within 2 taps from any screen. This structure is fixed — do not add a 5th tab.
2.  Core Features  (Must-Have)
These 8 features are the foundation. Every competitor has a weak version of most of these. Stira's job is to do each one better, deeper, and more human.
3.  New Features  (Competitors Lack These)
These 5 features exist in weak or broken forms across competitors. Stira builds them properly — with mobile-native interactions, AI integration, and design that makes them actually useful.
4.  ★ Signature Features  (Nobody Has These)

These 6 features have never been built in any recovery app. They are Stira's competitive moat — the reason users will never switch to another app. Each one is a new category, not a variation on an existing idea.
5.  Market Comparison
✓ = Full feature    ~  = Partial or weak version    ✗ = Not present    ★ = Stira exclusive
6.  Build Roadmap
Ship in this order. Phase 1 makes Stira usable. Phase 2 makes it smart. Phase 3 makes it irreplaceable. Phase 4 makes it legendary. Do not skip phases.
7.  Flutter Packages Reference
All packages listed below are pub.dev verified and actively maintained as of 2025.
Stira — End of Feature Plan  v1.0
19 features · 6 signature exclusives · Built for Flutter · Designed for recovery

★  SIGNATURE FEATURE  SIG-01
🧠  The Rewire Map
A visual brain map showing how the user's neural patterns are literally changing over time. As clean days accumulate, new pathways light up and old ones fade. It makes neuroplasticity visible, personal, and beautiful — turning recovery into something you can see with your own eyes.

HOW IT WORKS IN THE APP
Screen location: Insights Tab > "Rewire Map" section. A stylized (non-medical) brain illustration with two pathway systems: Old Pathways (faded red lines) and New Pathways (glowing teal lines). As clean days accumulate: Day 7 → first new pathway lights up with animation. Day 30 → 4 new pathways lit, old ones dimming. Day 90 → old pathways nearly invisible, new pathways bright. Tapping any pathway shows a card: "This pathway represents your [day range] of growth." Backed by real neuroscience copy: "Your dopamine receptors are recovering. This is what that looks like." Flutter: CustomPainter with animated Path drawing using AnimationController + CurvedAnimation.

★  SIGNATURE FEATURE  SIG-02
💗  SOS Heartbeat
When the user enters a Danger Zone or their check-in intensity hits 8+, Stira fires a specific custom vibration pattern — the SOS Heartbeat — that is physically unique and recognizable even in a pocket. It is not a notification. It is a physical interrupt that says: "You are not your autopilot." No app has ever used custom haptics as a recovery signal.

HOW IT WORKS IN THE APP
Trigger conditions: (1) Danger Zone radius entered via background geolocator, (2) Check-in intensity ≥ 8 logged, (3) User manually activates from Tools tab. Haptic pattern: 3 short pulses (100ms each) → pause 200ms → 1 long pulse (600ms) → pause 200ms → 3 short pulses. Fires silently with no screen required, works when phone is locked. Flutter: vibration package with custom pattern array. Onboarding training step: "Feel this vibration — this is your SOS Heartbeat. Learn to recognize it." After 5 activations, Stira asks: "Did the heartbeat help you pause?" — used to optimize timing. Settings: toggle on/off, adjust sensitivity threshold.

★  SIGNATURE FEATURE  SIG-03
🌑  Shadow Mode
Disguises Stira as a completely different app on the home screen and in the Android/iOS task switcher. Solves the #1 barrier to adoption: users who live with family, share devices, or fear social stigma delete the app because someone might see it. Shadow Mode gives privacy without hiding.

HOW IT WORKS IN THE APP
Screen location: Profile Tab > Settings > "Shadow Mode." User selects a disguise identity from a list: Weather App / Calculator / Finance Tracker / Notes App / Clock. The Flutter launcher icon, app name in task switcher, and splash screen all change to the selected disguise. Activation gesture: triple-tap the disguised icon (configured once during Shadow Mode setup). Inside: Stira runs completely normally. Implementation: flutter_launcher_icons for static icons; for dynamic icon change use iOS alternate icons API (UIApplication.setAlternateIconName) and Android shortcut/alias approach. The task switcher name change requires platform channels to call setTaskDescription on Android. This is a technically complex but buildable feature with major retention impact.

★  SIGNATURE FEATURE  SIG-04
🪞  The Mirror Protocol
A timed, camera-facing self-confrontation exercise for moments of high temptation. The user holds the phone camera facing themselves for 60 seconds while Stira overlays reflective questions. Looking at yourself in the moment of urge is one of the most powerful pattern interrupts in behavioral science — and no app has ever built it as a mobile feature.

HOW IT WORKS IN THE APP
Screen location: Tools Tab > "Mirror Protocol" (shown prominently when intensity ≥ 7). Opens front camera full-screen using camera package. 60-second countdown timer in top-right corner. NO recording, no storage — live only. Question overlay sequence every 15 seconds: (0s) "How do you feel right now?" (15s) "What are you actually looking for?" (30s) "Who are you in this moment?" (45s) "What will you feel in 10 minutes if you stop?" On completion at 60s: camera closes, orb turns teal, text appears: "You stayed. That's who you are." Session logged as a tool use (not stored, only counted). Privacy statement shown before first use: "This is never recorded or stored. It is only for you."

★  SIGNATURE FEATURE  SIG-05
🛡️  Streak Insurance
The #1 reason users quit recovery apps is losing a long streak to one moment of weakness and feeling like there is no point continuing. Streak Insurance lets users protect their streak once per milestone — not forgiving the relapse, but preventing the app abandonment that follows it. Research shows keeping users engaged after relapse dramatically improves long-term recovery outcomes.

HOW IT WORKS IN THE APP
Earn mechanic: unlocked at Day 14, Day 30, and Day 60 milestones (one insurance per milestone = up to 3 total per recovery cycle). Usage: after a relapse, a special screen appears before the streak resets — "You have Streak Insurance available. Use it?" If activated: streak counter does not reset. The relapse is logged in full (still visible in Insights, still feeds the AI, still counted in relapse data). The streak number shows a small amber shield icon (🛡) for 7 days after use. If not activated: normal streak reset. Messaging: "This is not forgiveness. It is resilience. One slip does not define your recovery." Available once per milestone only — clearly communicated. This is fundamentally different from "forgiveness" features — it is designed to keep users in the app and in recovery after a vulnerable moment.

★  SIGNATURE FEATURE  SIG-06
🤝  Bond Mode
A completely private two-person accountability system — no community, no groups, no strangers. Bond Mode connects two people who support each other with only the data each person chooses to share. It is deeper than any group chat, more private than any forum, and the opposite of surveillance-based accountability apps like Covenant Eyes.

HOW IT WORKS IN THE APP
Setup: user generates a 6-digit Bond Code. Shares it with one trusted person (friend, partner, sibling). Bond partner installs Stira and enters the code. Connection established — fully encrypted, peer-to-peer via Firebase or Supabase Realtime. Privacy controls: each person independently chooses what their bond partner sees — Streak only / Streak + check-in intensity / Full insights. Bond partner receives a notification when the user's intensity hits 7+: "[Your person] might need you right now." Bond partner can send a pre-written encouragement ("You've got this") or a custom message. No browsing history, no screen monitoring, no screenshots — zero surveillance. One bond per account (not a social network). Bond can be ended by either person at any time. Screen location: Tools Tab > "Bond Mode." Completely different value proposition from Relay (group) or Covenant Eyes (surveillance).

Feature | Package | Notes
Streak timer (live) | timer_builder | Updates every second without setState spam
Radial dial / check-in | syncfusion_flutter_gauges | Or build with GestureDetector + CustomPainter
Charts (insights) | fl_chart | Bar, line, scatter — fully customizable
Animations | flutter_animate | Staggered entry animations for cards
Background location | geolocator + background_location | For Danger Zones proximity monitoring
Maps (danger zones) | flutter_map + latlong2 | OpenStreetMap — no API key needed
Haptic patterns | vibration | Custom vibration array for SOS Heartbeat
Local ML / forecast | tflite_flutter | On-device model, no server needed
Text-to-speech (vault) | flutter_tts | For vault letter read-aloud feature
Camera (mirror) | camera | Front camera access for Mirror Protocol
Notifications | flutter_local_notifications | Local + scheduled push for all alerts
Storage (local) | hive + hive_flutter | Fast local NoSQL for check-in data
Real-time (bond mode) | supabase_flutter | Real-time channel for Bond Mode
Screen time (iOS) | screen_time (custom channel) | iOS ScreenTime API via method channel
Screen time (Android) | app_usage | Android UsageStatsManager wrapper
App icon change | flutter_launcher_icons | Static; Shadow Mode uses platform channels
Biometric lock | local_auth | FaceID / Fingerprint for app lock
Google Fonts | google_fonts | Syne + DM Mono + DM Sans
